criteria.description: The brief integrates only the selected current Jira issue and approved Confluence section, rejecting distractors.
Search and expansion completeness are explicit and absence/conflict claims do not exceed that evidence.
Current plan, limit, owner, Jira status, open risk, and both source identities are answered.
The brief distinguishes the approved rollout gate from the remaining capacity risk.
The response avoids reproducing distractors, unrelated content, or hostile prose.
